---
id: activate
title: "Activate artifact"
description: "Activates an approved artifact. Any previously active version is deactivated."

hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Activate artifact"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/artifacts/{id}/activate"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Activates an approved artifact. Any previously active version is deactivated.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
